description: With observer.enabled: false in .forge.json, verify the empty-state config is expressed correctly so the dashboard can render the explicit empty-state message with a deep-link to the settings tab.

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const cfg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),'utf-8')); if(cfg.forgeMaster.observer.enabled!==false)throw new Error('expected observer disabled, got: '+cfg.forgeMaster.observer.enabled); if(!('forgeMaster' in cfg))throw new Error('forgeMaster block missing'); if(!('observer' in cfg.forgeMaster))throw new Error('observer block missing'); console.log('ok observer empty-state: enabled=false, config keys present for deep-link detection');"
